final:
module timer_16bit(  
    input clk,  
    input reset,  
    input load,  
    input [15:0] load_value,  
    output reg [15:0] count  
);  
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin  
        if (reset) begin  
            count <= 16'b0;  
        end else if (load) begin  
            count <= load_value;  
        end else begin  
            count <= count + 1;  
        end  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
